items.title: Show HN: TTF-DOOM – A raycaster running inside TrueType font hinting
items.summary: TrueType fonts have a hinting VM that grid-fits glyphs. It has a stack, storage area, conditionals, function calls, and it turns out it's Turing-complete. So I built a raycasting engine in the hinting bytecode. The glyph "A" in the font has 16 vertical bar contours. The hinting program reads player

items.summary: I've spent the last years obsessed with a sideproject to build a humanistic 3D modeler for desktop.
